ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Continued To Jun-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Naish, via ZOOM, counsel for William Couch, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that the court is concerned with the amount of bond being requested as the proposed Personal Representative lives out of state. Mr. Naish advises that the Will waives the bond but after additional discussion, proposes that the court set bond at $1.5 million, with the belief that Mr. Couch will qualify for that bond amount.

There being no objections, the court plans to admit the Will dated July 05, 1991, and appoint William Couch as Executor with limited Authority. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate is set for May 10, 2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is taken under submission for the court to determine a bond amount.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Continued To May-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
